concept: You're piloting a recursive spaceship that contains smaller versions of itself inside, requiring you to zoom in and out to solve puzzles at different scales. Each time you shrink into a smaller ship, the physics change subtly, making previously simple tasks like navigation increasingly complex. External threats must be handled by the largest ship, while internal system failures need repair at the microscopic level. The goal is to maintain balance across all scales of the vessel before reaching your destination. Your final challenge is to stabilize a quantum core that exists simultaneously at all scales of your recursive ship.
